rules.condition: Broad customer-facing outage, high revenue risk, or regulated-market exposure.
rules.escalation_target: primary on-call, secondary on-call, incident commander, service lead
rules.message_template: P1 {service} incident in {environment}: {impact}. Suspected cause: {suspected_cause}. Next action: {next_action}.

rules.condition: Major degradation, partial outage, or high-impact single market.
rules.message_template: P2 {service} degradation in {environment}: {impact}. Recommended next action: {next_action}.
